data.body: Consideration: [Maintainability] The plugin already ships plugins/dso/hooks/lib/review-gate-allowlist.conf containing .tickets-tracker/** as a non-reviewable pattern. The new check-tickets-boundary.sh hook introduces a second allowlist with different semantics (what source code may reference .tickets-tracker/, NOT what is non-reviewable at commit time). Name the new allowlist file distinctly (e.g., tickets-boundary-allowlist.conf — NOT overlapping with review-gate-allowlist.conf). Cross-reference both files in inline comments so a maintainer editing one does not mistakenly believe they are editing the other. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
